title: Sound Byte 🎶
description: Record a 30 second voice memo of any melody stuck in your head.

title: System Reboot 🤖
description: Drink a full glass of water right now. Hydration protocol initiated.

title: Group Sync 🤷🏽‍♀️
description: Organise a small hangout with two or more people.

title: Inbox Purge 🧑‍🤝‍🧑
description: Clear or organise one cluttered inbox, folder, or notification stack.

title: Community Node 🌱
description: Attend a group, club, or event full of people you do not know.

title: Anomaly: Giving 🦖
description: Give away something you own to someone who needs it more than you do.

title: Sense Check 👀
description: Step outside. Name three things you can see, hear, and feel.
